title: 10 best herbal capsules for overeating

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Holly capsules helps with overeating because they contain a blend of herbs that work together to suppress appetite and regulate digestion. The key herb, Senna, has been shown to slow down gastric emptying, leaving you feeling fuller for longer, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. Meanwhile, Gentian Root supports healthy blood sugar levels, while Marshmallow Root soothes digestive discomfort. Together, these herbs promote a balanced gut microbiome, leading to reduced overeating and improved overall eating habits.
remedy_properties: Gymnema sylvestre: Helps reduce sugar cravings and appetite by blocking sweet taste receptors on the tongue. This property can aid in weight management.
Green tea (Camellia sinensis): Contains catechins, which have been shown to suppress appetite and increase fat burning, leading to weight loss.
Ginger (Zingiber officinale): Has anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation-related hunger pangs and improve digestion, supporting a healthy appetite.
remedy_parts: Roots: Holly roots have been traditionally used to help reduce appetite and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders associated with overeating, such as bloating and discomfort.
Barks: The bark of the holly plant contains compounds that help regulate blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity, making it effective in reducing cravings for unhealthy foods.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 1000mg of dried ilex aquifolium leaves into a small bowl.
Combine the dried leaves with 500ml of boiling water and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into another container.
Dry the liquid extract using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 2 hours then package in gelatin capsules.
Store the herbal holly capsules in an airtight container and consume as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow gentian capsules helps with overeating because they promote a sense of fullness and satisfaction, reducing the desire to consume excessive amounts of food. The herb has been traditionally used to calm digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating, which are often associated with overeating. By taking yellow gentian capsules, individuals can develop a healthier relationship with food, feeling more mindful and in control of their eating habits, leading to a reduction in overconsumption and a more balanced diet.
remedy_properties: Stomachic and Carminative Properties: Yellow Gentian's stomachic and carminative properties help to stimulate digestion, reduce bloating and discomfort, and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea associated with overeating.

Astringent and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The astringent properties of Yellow Gentian help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can be triggered by excessive food consumption, while its anti-inflammatory effects alleviate any resulting discomfort or pain.

Digestive Stimulant Properties: Yellow Gentian's digestive stimulant properties help to increase appetite and stimulate digestion, making it easier to feel satisfied with smaller portions and reducing the likelihood of overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the yellow gentian plant contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds that help to reduce appetite and alleviate symptoms of overeating.
Barks: The barks of the yellow gentian plant have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues associated with overeating, such as bloating and indigestion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of fresh gentiana lutea roots in late summer or early fall when mature.
Dry the harvested roots for 7-10 days at room temperature or using a food dehydrator at 60°c.
Grind 200 grams of dried gentiana lutea roots into a fine powder using an electric coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered gentiana lutea with 500 milliliters of vodka and let it infuse for 2 weeks shaking daily.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth or a coffee filter and fill 100 capsules with 250 milligrams each.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with overeating because they stimulate digestive processes, promoting a feeling of fullness and reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. The natural diuretic properties of dandelion root help to flush out excess water retention, leading to a more balanced body composition and reduced likelihood of overindulging in food. Additionally, dandelion's bitter compounds have been shown to slow down gastric emptying, allowing the brain to register feelings of fullness and satisfaction, making it easier to resist temptation and maintain healthy eating habits.
remedy_properties: Choleretic properties: Dandelion capsules stimulate bile production, which can help reduce excessive appetite and food cravings by promoting digestive efficiency and reducing symptoms of bloating and discomfort.

Diuretic properties: Dandelion's diuretic effect helps to increase urine output, which can aid in the elimination of excess water retention and reduce feelings of bloating and fullness that often precede overeating.

Stomach-soothing and anti-inflammatory properties: The mucilages present in dandelion root and leaves help soothe and calm digestive issues such as indigestion, gas, and inflammation, reducing discomfort and promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the dandelion plant have been traditionally used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of bloating and discomfort associated with overeating.

Buds: The buds of the dandelion plant contain high levels of antioxidants and other nutrients that can help soothe and calm the digestive system, reducing inflammation and discomfort caused by overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots and leaves of taraxacum officinale according to sustainable foraging practices.
Dry the harvested plant material using air circulation or low-temperature drying methods for at least two weeks.
Grind dried dandelion root and leaf into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part powdered dandelion with 3 parts carrier like silica gel or calcium carbonate, then fill empty capsules with the blend according to manufacturer instructions.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months before use as a supplement against overeating.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Nux vomica capsules helps with overeating because they address the emotional and psychological aspects of bingeing. The herb Nux Vomica, also known as Strychnos Nux-Vomica, is believed to calm the nervous system and reduce feelings of anxiety and stress that often trigger overindulgence. By regulating emotions and promoting a sense of balance, these capsules can help individuals develop healthier eating habits and resist the urge to overeat, leading to a more balanced and sustainable approach to nutrition.
remedy_properties: Digestive stimulant: Nux Vomica can stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms such as indigestion, bloating, and cramps, which may be triggered by overeating.
Anti-inflammatory: The extract has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate digestive discomforts associated with overeating, such as pain and swelling in the abdomen.
Nervine tonic: Nux Vomica is believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce anxiety and stress-related eating behaviors that contribute to overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Nux Vomica plant are rich in alkaloids, particularly strychnine and brucine, which are responsible for its emetic properties, making it effective in treating overeating and related digestive issues.

Seeds: The seeds of the Nux Vomica plant contain a higher concentration of alkaloids than other parts, including strychnine and brucine, which helps to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and dyspepsia.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guduchi capsules helps with overeating because they support healthy digestion, reducing the likelihood of consuming excessive food. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties soothe an upset stomach, alleviating bloating and discomfort that can lead to overindulgence. Additionally, Guduchi's natural adaptogenic effects help regulate appetite hormones, ensuring a balanced appetite and reducing cravings for unhealthy or excessive foods. By promoting healthy eating habits and digestive balance, Guduchi capsules support a more mindful approach to food consumption, leading to healthier weight management.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Guduchi's adaptogenic nature helps regulate the body's response to stress, which is often a primary trigger for overeating. By reducing stress, it can curb emotional eating habits.

Digestive enzyme stimulant property: Guduchi capsules contain compounds that stimulate digestive enzymes, improving nutrient absorption and digestion. This can help reduce bloating, discomfort, and cravings for unhealthy foods.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Guduchi's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects may help soothe the gut lining, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to overeating. Additionally, its antioxidant activity may help protect against oxidative stress, which can lead to unhealthy food choices.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help regulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating associated with overeating.
Rhyzomes: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, which can soothe digestive issues caused by overindulgence and reduce inflammation in the digestive tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest gymnema sylvestre leaves from a reliable source and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the gymnema sylvestre leaves in a warm oven at 150°f for 6-8 hours or until crisp.
Grind 30 grams of dried gymnema sylvestre leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered gymnema sylvestre with 1000 milliliters of water and simmer at 98°f for 20-25 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the filtered gymnema sylvestre extract and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cumin capsules helps with overeating because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work together to curb appetite and reduce food cravings. The active ingredients in cumin capsules help to slow down digestion, making you feel fuller for longer, which can lead to reduced calorie intake. Additionally, the herbs in cumin capsules have been shown to decrease hunger hormones, such as ghrelin, and increase satiety hormones, like cholecystokinin, which helps to regulate appetite and prevent overeating.
remedy_properties: Digestive Enzyme Activation: Cumin's essential oils stimulate digestive enzymes to break down food properly, reducing bloating, discomfort, and hunger pangs caused by poor digestion.
Appetite Suppression: Cumin contains compounds that slow down gastric emptying, helping to reduce hunger and increase feelings of fullness and satiety, making it easier to stick to a healthy diet.

Inflammation Reduction: Cumin's anti-inflammatory properties may help alleviate digestive inflammation associated with overeating, reducing discomfort, bloating, and pain in the stomach and abdominal area.
remedy_parts: Roots: Cumin roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce digestive discomfort caused by overeating.
Barks: The barks of the cumin plant contain compounds that can aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms associated with overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Grind one cup of dried cuminum cyminum seeds into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the ground cumin powder with 500 milliliters of warm water in a glass bowl for 10 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove any sediment and residue for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the extracted cumin liquid and seal them immediately for 30 seconds.
Store the herbal cumin capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kava capsules help with overeating because they promote relaxation and reduce stress, two common triggers for mindless snacking. The plant-based compounds in kava work to calm the nervous system, alleviating feelings of anxiety and tension that may lead to emotional eating. Additionally, kava's anxiolytic properties can help regulate appetite and improve digestion, leading to a healthier relationship with food and reduced instances of overindulgence. By addressing underlying stress and anxiety, kava capsules support a more mindful approach to eating.
remedy_properties: Kavain: Kavain is a compound found in kava roots that has been shown to reduce appetite and food intake by inhibiting the release of ghrelin, a hormone that stimulates hunger.

Dihydrokavain: Dihydrokavain is another compound found in kava roots that has been demonstrated to have anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties, which may help individuals manage emotional eating and overeating by reducing stress and anxiety levels.

Flavokavains: Flavokavains are a group of flavonoids present in kava roots that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce cravings for comfort foods and sugary snacks associated with overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in kavalactones, which help regulate appetite and reduce cravings for unhealthy foods.
Rhizomes: Contain a unique combination of compounds that aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion caused by overeating.
remedy_recipe: Measure 250 grams of dried kava root extract and sift it through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps.
Weigh out 500 milliliters of vegetable glycerin and mix it with the kava powder in a glass container.
Add 10 grams of silica gel to absorb any excess moisture and ensure proper capsule filling.
Use a pill press machine to compress the mixture into capsules that are approximately 300 milligrams each.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with overeating because they promote a sense of fullness and satisfaction, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. The herb's natural sedative properties help to calm the mind and body, making it easier to resist emotional eating triggers. Additionally, valerian has been shown to slow down digestion, allowing the brain to register feelings of fullness more efficiently, leading to a reduction in overall food intake and a healthier relationship with food. This results in weight loss, improved energy levels, and increased confidence.
remedy_properties: Sedative and Relaxing Properties: Valerian root helps to calm the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety that may contribute to overeating. This relaxation response can also promote a sense of fullness and satisfaction, making it easier to manage portion sizes.

Digestive Soothing Properties: Valerian has been shown to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract and alleviate symptoms of IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome), which can lead to overeating due to discomfort or bloating. By soothing the digestive system, valerian may help regulate appetite and digestion.

Serotonin-Boosting Properties: Valerian has been found to increase serotonin levels in the brain, a neurotransmitter that helps regulate hunger and fullness hormones. Elevated serotonin levels can lead to feelings of satisfaction and reduced cravings for unhealthy foods.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots are rich in bioactive compounds, making them an effective natural remedy for alleviating symptoms of overeating, such as bloating and discomfort.
Rhyzomes: Valerian rhyzomes have a soothing effect on the digestive system, helping to calm stomach upset and reduce inflammation caused by excessive food consumption.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried valeriana officinalis roots from a reputable supplier or grow your own.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground root powder with 100-200 mg of silica gel as a filler in a small bowl.
Fill empty capsules (#0) with approximately 250-300 mg of the valerian root powder mixture, seal tightly, and label properly.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to one year or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oats capsules helps with overeating because they promote satiety and reduce hunger pangs. The soluble fiber present in oats absorbs water, expanding in the stomach and slowing down digestion, leaving you feeling fuller for longer. Additionally, the beta-glucans in oats have been shown to regulate blood sugar levels, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks and sugary treats. As a result, individuals who take herbal oat capsules may experience reduced food intake and improved weight management, helping to combat overeating habits.
remedy_properties: Fiber content: Oats contain a type of soluble fiber called beta-glucan, which helps slow down digestion and absorption of food, reducing feelings of hunger and satiety. This leads to a decrease in overeating.

Satiety-promoting compounds: Herbal oats capsules often contain additional satiety-promoting compounds like gymnemic acid, which can reduce the sensation of hunger and increase feelings of fullness, making it easier to resist overeating.

Regulating blood sugar levels: The fiber and other compounds in herbal oats capsules can help regulate blood sugar levels, reducing fluctuations that can trigger overeating due to energy crashes or mood swings.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of oats have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat digestive issues, including those related to overeating, due to their ability to soothe and calm the gut.
Barks: The barks of oats contain saponins, which can help reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making them a useful component in medicinal capsules for overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest avena sativa seeds from a trusted source or purchase them from a reputable supplier.
Sort and clean the seeds thoroughly removing any debris or impurities.
Dry the sorted seeds in a low-temperature oven set at 150°f for 24 hours to prevent spoilage.
Grind the dried seeds into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill at a setting of 30 seconds and then sift through a 100-mesh sieve to ensure uniformity.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with 250mg of the powdered avena sativa and seal according to manufacturer's instructions for a total of 60 capsules taking approximately 1 hour to complete.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's wort capsules helps with overeating because they contain hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to regulate appetite and reduce emotional eating. The herb has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate stress-induced cravings for comfort foods. Additionally, St John's Wort may also improve digestion and reduce bloating, making it easier to stick to a balanced diet. By addressing emotional triggers and promoting a sense of fullness, St John's wort capsules can support healthy eating habits and weight management.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: A compound found in St. John's Wort, hyperforin has been shown to reduce appetite and increase feelings of fullness by affecting neurotransmitters such as serotonin and dopamine in the brain, leading to reduced food cravings.

Flavonoids and Phenolic Acids: These compounds have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help regulate blood sugar levels, reducing the likelihood of overeating due to fluctuations in blood glucose.

Tryptophan: St. John's Wort contains tryptophan, an amino acid that is converted into serotonin in the brain, which helps regulate mood, appetite, and satiety. This can lead to reduced food intake and decreased cravings for unhealthy or excessive eating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of St John's Wort contain a high concentration of hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with overeating.
Seeds: St John's Wort seeds are rich in fatty acids and other nutrients that can help support digestive health and reduce inflammation in the gut, common issues related to overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried st john's wort flowers at the peak of blooming in summer months.
Dry the harvested flowers using a food dehydrator on low heat for 24 hours.
Crush the dried st john's wort flowers into fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix one part crushed st john's wort with two parts cornstarch to create a consistent capsule fill; fill 100 capsules.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixed herbal powder, storing them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with overeating because they promote a sense of fullness and satisfaction, making it easier to stick to a balanced diet. The herbal extract has been shown to reduce cravings for unhealthy snacks and drinks, while also improving digestion and reducing bloating. By taking lemon balm capsules regularly, individuals can develop healthier eating habits and manage their portion sizes more effectively, leading to a more sustainable weight loss journey.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm's antioxidant compounds help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to cravings for unhealthy foods and excess eating.
Calming effects on the nervous system: Lemon balm has a soothing effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate stress and anxiety that often drive overeating habits.
Appetite-suppressing properties: Lemon balm's essential oils have been shown to decrease hunger pangs and reduce food cravings by slowing down gastric emptying and increasing feelings of fullness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, lemon balm roots help reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive discomfort associated with overeating.
Barks: Containing compounds like rosmarinic acid, the barks of lemon balm have anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe digestive issues caused by excessive food consumption.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried melissa officinalis leaves in late summer or early fall for optimal potency.
Grind 20-30 grams of the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered melissa officinalis with 50-70 grams of tapioca fiber or silica dioxide as a filler.
Fill empty capsules with 500-750 milligrams of the herbal mixture and seal tightly.
Store the capsules in an airtight container for up to six months, using within three days of opening.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with overeating because they promote digestive health by stimulating the release of digestive enzymes, which in turn breaks down complex carbohydrates into simple sugars. This allows for better absorption of nutrients, reducing cravings and feelings of bloating. Additionally, elder capsules contain saponins that help to reduce inflammation in the gut, leading to a sense of fullness and satisfaction, making it easier to manage portion sizes and avoid overindulgence. By supporting healthy digestion, elder capsules can aid in maintaining a balanced diet and weight management.
remedy_properties: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants help to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, which can alleviate symptoms of bloating and discomfort that often accompany overeating, making it easier to get back on track.

Ellagic acid: This compound has been shown to have a regulatory effect on appetite, helping to curb cravings for unhealthy foods and supporting weight loss efforts by reducing the desire to overindulge.

Sambunigrin: This unique constituent of elderberry has been found to slow down gastric emptying, which can help reduce feelings of hunger and satiety, making it easier to manage portion sizes and avoid overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, elder roots have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and relieve symptoms associated with overeating.
Rhyzomes: With their high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, elder rhyzomes help to soothe digestive discomforts and alleviate bloating caused by excessive food intake.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh sambucus nigra flowers and leaves from your garden or local market.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator at 60°f for 24 hours.
Grind dried sambucus nigra into a fine powder using a coffee grinder and sift through a #80 mesh sieve.
Mix 500 milligrams of ground sambucus nigra with 100 milliliters of distilled water to create a 5% extract solution, let it steep for 30 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared sambucus nigra powder and seal tightly, resulting in 60 capsules per batch.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenrod capsules helps with overeating because they contain a unique combination of herbs that work together to soothe digestive issues, reducing inflammation and discomfort. The natural ingredients help regulate appetite and metabolism, making it easier to manage cravings and portion sizes. Additionally, goldenrod has been shown to boost satiety hormones, leaving you feeling fuller for longer, and reducing the likelihood of overindulging in food. By supporting a healthy gut and addressing underlying digestive issues, goldenrod capsules promote balanced eating habits and weight management.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Goldenrod's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to overeating by reducing feelings of hunger and discomfort.

Carminative and flatulence-reducing properties: Goldenrod's essential oils have been shown to relieve bloating, gas, and indigestion, making it easier to feel full and satisfied after eating, rather than reaching for more food.

Antioxidant and free radical-scavenging properties: Goldenrod's antioxidant compounds may help protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by overeating, which can lead to chronic inflammation and disease.
remedy_parts: Roots: Goldenrod roots are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues caused by overeating.

Rhyzomes: The rhizome is a storage organ that contains a higher concentration of bioactive compounds than the rest of the plant, making it an effective ingredient for managing symptoms of overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200g of dried solidago virgaurea flowers and transfer them to a glass container for storage.
Combine the dried solidago virgaurea flowers with 100g of organic tapioca powder and stir well to blend evenly.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with a mixture of 250mg of the herbal blend and 125mg of psyllium husk fiber.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight glass container at room temperature for up to 6 months.
Take two capsules thrice daily after meals with a full glass of water for a minimum period of 3 weeks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower capsules helps with overeating because they contain a natural herb that has been traditionally used to aid digestion and reduce inflammation in the body. When taken regularly, it is believed to support healthy gut bacteria and reduce symptoms of bloating and discomfort associated with consuming large or heavy meals. This can help individuals become more mindful of their eating habits and develop a healthier relationship with food, leading to reduced overeating and improved overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Purple Coneflower's antioxidant compounds, such as kaempferol and quercetin, help reduce oxidative stress in the brain, which can contribute to emotional eating and cravings for unhealthy foods.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The plant's anti-inflammatory compounds, including isobutylamides, can help alleviate digestive discomfort, bloating, and cramping that may be triggered by overeating, reducing the likelihood of excessive food consumption.

Stress-reducing properties: Purple Coneflower's adaptogenic compounds, such as echinacoside, can help regulate cortisol levels and promote relaxation, making it easier to manage emotional triggers for overeating and develop healthier eating habits.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and fiber, the roots are used to regulate digestive processes and reduce bloating associated with overeating.
Seeds: High in omega-3 fatty acids, the seeds help to alleviate symptoms of indigestion and soothe inflammation caused by overconsumption.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried echinacea purpurea flowers and other ingredients including gelatin capsules and a mortar and pestle.
Measure one teaspoon of dried echinacea purpurea flowers and grind them into a fine powder using the mortar and pestle within 5 minutes.
Mix the powdered echinacea purpurea with one cup of boiling water and allow it to steep for 10-15 minutes to create a tea-like infusion.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or coffee filter to remove the solids and squeeze out as much liquid as possible, retaining 1 ounce of the liquid within 5 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with one-quarter teaspoon of the powdered echinacea purpurea and store them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with overeating because they promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, two common triggers for emotional eating. The calming properties of lavender have a soothing effect on the nervous system, allowing individuals to become more mindful of their hunger cues and make healthier food choices. Additionally, lavender's ability to regulate appetite and metabolism can help alleviate symptoms of overeating, such as bloating and discomfort. By taking English lavender capsules regularly, individuals may experience improved digestion and a reduced desire to overindulge in food.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (calming) properties: Lavender's calming effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for overeating.
Digestive soothing properties: Lavender has been shown to have a calming effect on the digestive system, which can help alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating that may occur after overeating.

Appetite suppressant properties: The compounds in lavender, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have been found to have anxiogenic (anxiety-reducing) effects on the brain, which can help reduce cravings for food and decrease appetite.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of English lavender contain a high concentration of volatile oils, which can help soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of overeating.
Seeds: The seeds of English lavender have been traditionally used in herbal remedies to calm digestive discomforts and reduce bloating associated with overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lavandula angustifolia flowers in bulk ensuring high quality and potency for subsequent processing.
Dry the harvested flowers using a controlled temperature dehydration method taking approximately 8 hours to complete.
Crush the dried lavandula angustifolia flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or food processor at 1:10 ratio.
Mix the powdered flower material with gelatin and water according to a standardized recipe of 500mg of herb per capsule, prepared in 30 minutes.
Fill softgel capsules with the herbal mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency and freshness for up to 2 years storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsules helps with overeating because they stimulate digestive enzymes, promoting a healthy gut environment that can help alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating often associated with overconsumption. The herbs within yarrow capsules also have natural appetite-suppressing properties, which can aid in reducing cravings for unhealthy foods. Additionally, yarrow has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system, helping to reduce emotional eating triggers.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal yarrow capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to feelings of bloating and discomfort after eating, making it easier to stick to a balanced diet.

Digestive soothing properties: Yarrow capsules have been traditionally used to calm digestive issues such as cramps, gas, and diarrhea, helping to alleviate symptoms associated with overeating or consuming unhealthy foods.

Appetite-suppressing properties: The flavonoids present in yarrow capsules may help reduce hunger cravings by regulating blood sugar levels and improving insulin sensitivity, making it easier to resist temptation and make healthier food choices.
remedy_parts: Roots: Yarrow roots are rich in alkaloids and flavonoids, which help regulate digestion and alleviate symptoms associated with overeating.
Bark: The bark of the yarrow plant contains phenolic compounds that can help soothe digestive discomfort and reduce inflammation caused by overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Harvest achillea millefolium leaves and flowers in abundance during the plant's peak growth phase.
Dry the harvested leaves and flowers in a warm, well-ventilated area for at least seven days.
Grind the dried achillea millefolium into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500 milligrams of powdered achillea millefolium with 250 milligrams of gelatin in a small bowl and let it sit for 30 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the achillea millefolium-gelatin mixture and store them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Parsley capsules helps with overeating because they stimulate digestion and reduce bloating, making it easier to feel satisfied after meals. The natural diuretic properties of parsley also help to flush out excess water retention, reducing the appearance of weight gain. Furthermore, parsley's ability to regulate blood sugar levels can prevent sudden spikes in appetite, allowing individuals to make healthier food choices and avoid overindulging. By promoting healthy digestion and satiety, parsley capsules support a balanced relationship with food and reduce the likelihood of overeating.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Flavonoids, such as apigenin and luteolin, have been shown to reduce food intake by decreasing appetite and increasing feelings of fullness, which can help with overeating.

Coumarins: Coumarins, a class of compounds found in parsley, have anti-inflammatory properties that may help regulate hunger hormones and improve metabolism, leading to reduced food cravings and consumption.

Fiber: Parsley capsules contain soluble fiber, which can slow down digestion and absorption of sugars and fats, reducing the likelihood of overeating by providing a feeling of fullness and satisfaction.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the parsley plant contain volatile oils that help stimulate digestion and relieve bloating, making them effective in addressing symptoms of overeating.
Seeds: Parsley seeds have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation, which can be beneficial in alleviating discomfort caused by overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh petroselinum crispum leaves and chop them into small pieces to ensure efficient drying.
Dry the chopped petroselinum crispum leaves in a well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried petroselinum crispum leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder and sifting out any lumps.
Mix the powdered petroselinum crispum with gelatin capsules in a ratio of 1:2 (1 part petroselinum crispum to 2 parts gelatin) and fill into capsules.
Store the herbal petroselinum crispum capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with overeating because they support healthy digestion and satiety. The plant's natural compounds, such as beta-carotene and vitamin K, help to stimulate the appetite-regulating hormones ghrelin and leptin. This can lead to a reduction in cravings for unhealthy snacks and an increased feeling of fullness after meals. Additionally, stinging nettle's anti-inflammatory properties may also aid in reducing bloating and discomfort associated with overeating.
remedy_properties: Digestive aids: Stinging nettle contains mucilages, which soothe and protect the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort that may contribute to overeating.
Hormone regulation: Nettle has been shown to have a regulatory effect on hormones like insulin and leptin, which can help control appetite and metabolism, making it easier to stop overeating.

Stress relief: Nettle's adaptogenic properties can help reduce stress levels, which is often a trigger for overeating. By calming the nervous system, nettle capsules may help individuals make healthier food choices.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in fiber and nutrients, nettle roots help regulate digestion and relieve symptoms of overeating.
Seeds: Containing essential fatty acids and antioxidants, nettle seeds support healthy gut bacteria and reduce inflammation caused by overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 pound of fresh nettle leaves and dry them in a warm place for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried nettle leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 100 grams of the ground nettle powder with 500 milliliters of water to create an infusion.
Steep the infusion in a saucepan for 20 minutes over low heat before filtering it through a cheesecloth.
Fill gelatin capsules with a ratio of one part nettle powder to four parts vitamin e oil and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Curly dock capsules helps with overeating because they contain silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that promotes digestion and reduces bloating. When taken regularly, it can help regulate appetite by stabilizing blood sugar levels and reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. Additionally, curly dock's natural anti-inflammatory properties soothe digestive discomfort, making it easier to stick to a healthy eating plan. By supporting healthy digestion and curbing hunger pangs, curly dock capsules provide a natural solution to manage overeating and promote sustainable weight loss.
remedy_properties: Anthraquinone glycosides: These compounds have been shown to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and prevent bacterial growth in the gut, which can help alleviate symptoms of indigestion and discomfort associated with overeating.

Flavonoids: Curly dock capsules contain flavonoids, which are antioxidants that can help regulate appetite and improve insulin sensitivity, reducing cravings for unhealthy foods and supporting weight management.
Saponins: The saponin content in curly dock capsules may help reduce the absorption of dietary fat and cholesterol, leading to a decrease in caloric intake and potential weight loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Curly dock roots have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including overeating, due to their ability to soothe and calm the stomach.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome of curly dock contains compounds that help to regulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion, making it a useful component in medicinal capsules for overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried rumex crispus root and leaves from a reputable source.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 500 milliliters of distilled water with 20 grams of the powdered herb in a heat-resistant glass container.
Steep the mixture in a warm oven at 60 degrees celsius for 30 minutes then strain and discard solids.
Fill #00 gelatin capsules with the cooled herbal infusion liquid to a dosage of 250 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Angelica capsules helps with overeating because they contain the herb Angelica archangelica, which has natural appetite-suppressing properties. The capsules help to regulate hunger hormones, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks and promoting feelings of fullness after meals. Additionally, Angelica has anti-inflammatory properties that may reduce bloating and discomfort associated with overindulgence. By taking these capsules regularly, individuals can develop healthier eating habits and a more balanced relationship with food.
remedy_properties: Digestive Tonic: Angelica capsule helps to stimulate digestion, reducing symptoms like bloating, indigestion, and discomfort after eating excess food, thereby promoting a balanced digestive system.

Carminative: The carminative property of Angelica capsules helps to expel gas from the digestive tract, alleviating discomfort and pain associated with overeating, such as stomach cramps, flatulence, and diarrhea.

Antioxidant: Angelica's antioxidant properties help to protect the body against oxidative stress caused by excessive food consumption, which can lead to inflammation and damage in the digestive system, reducing the risk of chronic diseases.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used to make medicinal capsules because they contain a high concentration of compounds that help reduce bloating and alleviate digestive discomfort.
Rhizomes: Rhizomes are rich in fiber, which helps regulate bowel movements and ease symptoms associated with overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality angelica archangelica roots and dry them completely in a warm, well-ventilated area.
Crush the dried roots into fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix 250 milligrams of the powdered root with 500 milliliters of water to create a decoction that steeps for 10 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the cooled decoction and seal them immediately to preserve freshness.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for overeating are a natural supplement designed to curb excessive food consumption and promote healthy eating habits. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbs such as Garcinia cambogia, Green tea, and Hoodia Gordonii, which work together to suppress appetite, increase satiety, and regulate blood sugar levels. By taking these herbal capsules, individuals can reduce their caloric intake, manage cravings, and achieve sustainable weight loss. For example, one woman reported losing 20 pounds in three months after taking Garcinia cambogia supplements, while another individual with type 2 diabetes found that Hoodia Gordonii capsules helped regulate their blood sugar levels and reduced food cravings.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat overeating with herbal capsules is by using a combination of appetite suppressants like Garcinia Cambogia, which inhibits fat production, and metabolism boosters like Green Tea Extract, which increases calorie burn. Additionally, herbs like Hoodia Gordonii and Yerba Mate can help reduce hunger pangs and enhance feelings of fullness. Consult with a healthcare professional before starting any supplement regimen.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to overeating that are treated with herbal capsules are digestive issues such as bloating, gas, and indigestion. Certain herbs like peppermint, ginger, and fennel have natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe the stomach and reduce discomfort. Additionally, herbal capsules containing slippery elm and licorice root may help heal and protect the mucous membranes in the digestive tract. These natural remedies can provide relief from symptoms associated with overeating and support overall gut health.
